raw_consumer_statement: Received statement from Barclays for a Jet Blue Miles Plus Credit Card with a $ XXXX past due balance. I have never applied for a credit card with Barclays, I have never banked at Barclays. I have never flown with Jet Blue. I submitted a dispute and the credit card company did not believe that it was fraudulent and claims I am still responsbile for the amount owed.
